Pricing

AgentSentry is free and open source. Always.

Free

Open Source — MIT License

  • All 9 MCP tools
  • Hash-chained memory store
  • Secret detection (20+ patterns)
  • Risk scoring & rules validation
  • CLI with 11 commands
  • SQLite storage (zero config)
  • Progressive enablement (5 levels)
  • Full observability stack
  • Unlimited events & sessions
  • Community support via GitHub
Get Started

Enterprise Support

Need dedicated support, SLAs, or custom integrations?

Enterprise support is coming soon.

Frequently Asked Questions

Is AgentSentry really free?

Yes. The core platform is MIT licensed and will always be free. We believe agent safety should be accessible to everyone.

What about data privacy?

AgentSentry stores all data locally by default (SQLite). Your events, decisions, and agent memory never leave your machine unless you configure a remote provider.

Can I use it in production?

Yes. The core features (MCP server, memory store, CLI, primitives, observability) are all marked stable with 1,102 tests passing.

How do I upgrade enablement levels?

Run npx agent-sentry enable for an interactive wizard, or set --level on init. Each level adds skills incrementally — no disruption to existing workflows.

AgentSentry

Memory-aware agent safety. Your AI agents never forget — and never go rogue.
